title: Calculation Date function using interval and year
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_1 ( id_tempo UInt32, data DateTime NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id_tempo) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id_tempo;
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_1 WHERE data BETWEEN '2012-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2012-01-02 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_2 ( id_tempo UInt32, data Date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id_tempo) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id_tempo;
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_2 WHERE data >= '2000-01-01';
key_bug_features: Calculation Date function using interval with year
